text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gah! I thought this one was in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's what you're thinking, right?! But don't you
fret! I have luck on my side!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
When I saw my time in today's race, my lucky
number happened to be there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'm definitely going to win next
time... In fact, consider it already won!
choice_data_list: Make sure you still give your best at practice.
Make sure you still give your best at practice.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'm definitely going to win next
time... In fact, consider it already won!
choice_data_list: Make sure you still give your best at practice.
Make sure you still give your best at practice.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yep! I am the lucky-musume after all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm riding on a treasure ship with the seven gods
of fortune, so sit back and watch the luck come
rolling in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Crash! Splash! More and more treasures, riding the waves my way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, haha! But of course! I'll give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, I take these things very seriously!
Serious is my middle name!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, hold on a minute! Where did my left cleat
go?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No no no... That's my lucky cleat! Wh-where'd it
go?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More challenges are sure to lie ahead. We resolve
to work harder to bring more fortunate results in
the future.
